parameters.name: q
parameters.value: SELECT Id, Name, Status__c, Total_Monthly_Recurring_Amount__c, Tier__c, LastActivityDate, Contract_Renewal_Date__c, Health_Score__c, Health_Tier__c, Cancellation_or_Pause_Request_Date__c, Delinquent__c, Flagged_Status__c, OwnerId, Owner.Name FROM Account WHERE Status__c IN ('Active', 'Renewal', 'Non Renewing', 'Reinstated', 'Delinquent', 'Paused', 'Pending') AND OwnerId != '005PU000001eUQDYA2' AND (Cancellation_or_Pause_Request_Date__c != null OR Delinquent__c = true OR Flagged_Status__c = true OR Health_Tier__c IN ('Critical', 'At Risk')) ORDER BY Total_Monthly_Recurring_Amount__c DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 50

parameters.name: q
parameters.value: SELECT Id, Name, Status__c, Refund_Amount__c, Reason__c, CreatedDate, Account__c, Account__r.Name, Account__r.Owner.Name FROM Refund_Request__c WHERE Status__c != 'Closed' ORDER BY CreatedDate DESC LIMIT 25

parameters.name: text
parameters.value:
✅ *Prophet Nightly Churn Scan — {{ new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-US', { weekday: 'long', month: 'long', day: 'numeric', year: 'numeric' }) }}*

All clear. No churn signals detected tonight.
No cancellation requests, no delinquent accounts, no critical or at-risk health tiers, no open refund requests.

_Prophet will scan again tomorrow at 11 PM._
